Name: Fixed-term (CDD)
Description: Employment with a set start and end date.

Name: Temporary/Agency
Description: Hired via agency for short assignments.

Name: Part-time
Description: Work hours less than a full-time schedule.

Name: Freelance/Consultant
Description: Independent contractor not a direct employee.

Name: Apprenticeship/Internship
Description: Training contract usually for students or juniors.
